scripts.worker:dev: npm run build && npx wrangler dev --config wrangler.toml --local --port 8787
scripts.deploy:production: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml --name=jakubastroweb
scripts.deploy:staging: PUBLIC_SITE_ENV=staging npm run build && npx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml --name=jakubastroweb-staging
